{{Quote|Well (hee), yes. I can do the job. Only a hundred credits|Moplin Jarron|<ref name="GG7" />}}
'''Moplin Jarron''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] who ran [[Heff's Souvenirs]] at [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. He bought the place when [[Heff (Lepi)|Heff]] died. Since the shop was basically a junk store and the tourist trade during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Civil War]] was too low on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to make a living from the shop, Jarron got his primary income from his ability to [[Forger (profession)/Legends|forge]] documents such as IDs and passports.
